task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface loaded in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct service request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the request details page displaying the subject 'Need Adobe Acrobat Pro installed for contract review'.

task_completion.description: Verify the priority of the request is changed to Medium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Priority dropdown or field being actively set to 'Medium' (changed from 'Low').

task_completion.description: Verify the required escalation note is entered into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a note, comment, or resolution text box containing the exact text: 'Priority escalated as legal team requires this for contract deadline this week.'

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the priority and the note are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message or the updated request page showing the Priority as 'Medium' and the new note successfully added to the request's history or notes section.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands or APIs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus UI. There should be no terminal windows, curl commands, or script executions visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual ticketing system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the browser URL and interface layout to ensure the agent is interacting with the real ManageEngine application, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the note was added to an appropriate field.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the note text is placed in a designated notes, comments, or resolution field within the ticket, rather than being pasted into a search bar or an unrelated input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Request Subject: 'Need Adobe Acrobat Pro installed for contract review'. Initial Priority: Low. Target Priority: Medium. Required Note: 'Priority escalated as legal team requires this for contract deadline this week.'
